queueTopLevel.activation_rule: Use these items immediately on shards whose current flagship closeout slice is empty; do not let them replace active shards already assigned to the current closeout frontier.

requiredMarkers: checking next-90 M103 Chummer5a veteran certification guard

certificationMatrixRow.chummer5aBaseline: Existing .chum5-era import still starts from the desktop shell and exposes the familiar open-character route.
certificationMatrixRow.gesture: Load the bundled legacy runner, then open File > Open Character on the promoted desktop head.

workflowMap.legacyFamiliarity: Existing .chum5-era import still starts from the desktop shell and exposes the familiar open-character route.
workflowMap.parityQuestion: Can a veteran find the classic import route after landing in the modern workbench?
workflowMap.promotedHeadTaskProof: Load the bundled legacy runner, then open File > Open Character on the promoted desktop head.

certificationMatrixRow.chummer5aBaseline: The Master Index utility remains a named searchable reference surface.
certificationMatrixRow.gesture: Open Master Index from the promoted desktop command surface.

workflowMap.legacyFamiliarity: The Master Index utility remains a named searchable reference surface.
workflowMap.parityQuestion: Can a veteran reach the familiar index/search utility from desktop chrome?
workflowMap.promotedHeadTaskProof: Open Master Index from the promoted desktop command surface.

certificationMatrixRow.chummer5aBaseline: Chummer5a top menu roots remain visible as File, Edit, Special, Tools, Windows, and Help.
certificationMatrixRow.gesture: Open the promoted Avalonia head and expand a primary menu to reveal command choices.

workflowMap.legacyFamiliarity: Chummer5a top menu roots remain visible as File, Edit, Special, Tools, Windows, and Help.
workflowMap.parityQuestion: Can a veteran find the same top-level command geography in the first minute?
workflowMap.promotedHeadTaskProof: Open the promoted Avalonia head and expand a primary menu to reveal command choices.

certificationMatrixRow.chummer5aBaseline: The Character Roster utility is still a named utility surface, not hidden behind campaign-only navigation.
certificationMatrixRow.gesture: Open Character Roster from the promoted desktop command surface.

workflowMap.legacyFamiliarity: The Character Roster utility is still a named utility surface, not hidden behind campaign-only navigation.
workflowMap.parityQuestion: Can a veteran find the familiar roster utility without support instructions?
workflowMap.promotedHeadTaskProof: Open Character Roster from the promoted desktop command surface.

certificationMatrixRow.chummer5aBaseline: Global Settings remains a first-minute settings route with source and roster configuration lineage.
certificationMatrixRow.gesture: Open Global Settings from the promoted desktop toolstrip/menu surface.

workflowMap.legacyFamiliarity: Global Settings remains a first-minute settings route with source and roster configuration lineage.
workflowMap.parityQuestion: Can a veteran find global setup before editing a character?
workflowMap.promotedHeadTaskProof: Open Global Settings from the promoted desktop toolstrip/menu surface.

certificationMatrixRow.chummer5aBaseline: Classic flat workbench actions remain immediate toolbar buttons instead of dashboard cards.
certificationMatrixRow.gesture: Inspect the initial shell and verify load, import, save, settings, support, and close actions stay in the toolstrip.

workflowMap.legacyFamiliarity: Classic flat workbench actions remain immediate toolbar buttons instead of dashboard cards.
workflowMap.parityQuestion: Can a veteran start normal character work from the same always-visible toolbar posture?
workflowMap.promotedHeadTaskProof: Inspect the initial shell and verify load, import, save, settings, support, and close actions stay in the toolstrip.
